title: determine_visibility returns owned Strings of static content
description: inbox.rs lines 1047-1058: determine_visibility() returns `"public".to_string()`, `"unlisted".to_string()`, etc. — allocating a new String every time for values that are compile-time constants. The result is only ever compared with == or passed to SQLite bind (which accepts &str). What goes wrong: unnecessary allocation on every inbound Create activity. The function could return &'static str (or better, an enum per issue smallhold-9ouq.2). Minimal fix: return &'static str.
